expectations.evidence: File uses structured blocks: module, entity, value, command, event, aggregate, statemachine, enum keywords throughout
Entities: LoanApplication, CreditAnalysis, ProductConfiguration, AutoApprovalConfiguration (4 entities)
Three aggregates defined: LoanApplicationAggregate, ProductConfigurationAggregate, AutoApprovalConfigurationAggregate
8 value types: Money, Percentage, FinancialRatio, ChecklistItem, CreditDecision, DelegationMatrix, RatioOverrideRecord, StateHistoryEntry
CreateLoanApplication, SubmitLoanApplication, ComputeFinancialRatios, DecideLoanApplication, AutoApproveLoanApplication, etc.
LoanApplicationCreated, LoanApplicationSubmitted, FinancialRatiosComputed, CreditScoreComputed, LoanApplicationApproved, LoanApplicationRejected, etc.
statemachine LoanApplicationLifecycle defined at line 689 with states DRAFT, SUBMITTED, UNDER_REVIEW, APPROVED, REJECTED

Multiple invariants: applicationMustBeComplete, noAutoRejection, overrideMustHaveJustification, scoringOverrideMustHaveRationale, routingOverrideRequiresHigherAuthority, productConfigurationMustBeValid
Error events emitted: ApplicationSubmissionRejected, FieldValidationFailed, FinancialRatioComputationFailed, CreditScoreComputationFailed; preconditions on most commands
No 'database', 'API', or 'DTO' found in entity or value type names
satisfies populated on entities (e.g. LoanApplication satisfies [REQ-ORI-001..008, REQ-AUT-001, REQ-AUT-004]), value types, invariants, operations, and aggregates with specific REQ-* references
Covers REQ-ORI-001 through REQ-ORI-008, REQ-SCO-001 through REQ-SCO-007, REQ-AUT-001 through REQ-AUT-004, REQ-CFG-001 and REQ-CFG-002 — satisfies references span all requirement groups
